question: What changed in the 2024 VectorDB retention policy?
answer: The 2024 VectorDB retention policy changed audit log retention from 30 days to 90 days [policy-2024]. Customer content logs stay disabled by default [policy-2024].

documents.title: VectorDB Retention Policy 2024
documents.text: In 2024, VectorDB changed audit log retention from 30 days to 90 days. Customer content logs remain disabled by default. The update applies to enterprise workspaces.

documents.title: VectorDB Data FAQ
documents.text: Before the 2024 update, audit logs were retained for 30 days. Workspace billing exports are retained for 365 days.
